targetAgents.title: Target Agents
targetAgents.description: Array of agent names to scrape. The scraper fuzzy-matches these against the CRM dropdown to find agent_ids. If empty, no agents are scraped.

agentTiers.title: Agent Tier Map
agentTiers.description: Object mapping agent name → tier (T1/T2/T3). Used for stale-lead heuristic calculations.

requestDelay.title: Request Delay (ms)
requestDelay.description: Delay between agent page loads to avoid rate-limiting.
